description_long: This is a blue aluminum beverage can with a metallic top and pull tab, featuring a playful, stylized design. The front displays a large, partially obscured 'Pepsi' logo with a pot graphic and the phrase 'It's out of this world!' in white and orange. One side of the can shows a cartoon character in a blue outfit and boxing gloves, set against a striped background. A QR code and the phrase 'Scan me' are visible on the back, suggesting interactive or promotional content. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull tab, and a 'Limited Edition' label is printed near the rim. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, with vibrant blue as the dominant color accented by red, white, and silver details.
description: A blue, limited edition Pepsi can with a playful design, featuring a cartoon character, QR code, and bold branding. The can is metallic, glossy, and decorated with vibrant graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'Pepsi' logo, pot graphic, and part of the 'Limited Edition' label.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a QR code, 'Scan me' text, and part of the cartoon character.
description_view_2: Opposite side highlights the full cartoon character in blue attire and boxing gloves.
description_view_3: Back view focuses on the 'Limited Edition' label with minimal graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized 'Pepsi' logo in white and orange, located on the front of the can, with a pot graphic integrated into the design.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A 'Limited Edition' label near the top rim and a cartoon character in blue boxing attire on the side; QR code with 'Scan me' text on the back.
